fix_diff: Added HIGH_RISK_REPORT_RE for standalone FAIL/QA: FAIL lines and added high-risk terms for do not merge, blocking QA findings, and recommendation: do not merge. Added regression test_high_risk_report_detects_standalone_qa_fail so QA FAIL cannot pass auto-merge policy.
root_cause: High-risk report parser only matched phrases such as result: fail and did not detect standalone FAIL lines, blocking QA findings, or recommendation: do not merge.
symptom: Self-maintenance policy auto-merged a branch even though report-only QA output began with FAIL and recommended not to merge.
